ai_model_deployment_&_mlops.question: What is MLOps, and why is it important?
What is model deployment?
Why can't trained machine learning models simply be copied into production without additional work?
What is model serving?
Why are APIs commonly used to serve AI models?
What is model versioning?
Why is Docker commonly used when deploying AI models?
What is model monitoring?
What is data drift?
What is model drift?
Explain the complete lifecycle of deploying a machine learning model into production.
How would you monitor the performance of a deployed AI model?
How would you determine whether poor production performance is caused by the model, the data, or the deployment infrastructure?
How would you implement CI/CD for machine learning models?
Why is model versioning as important as source code versioning?
How would you safely deploy a new model without affecting all users immediately?
Explain the difference between batch inference and real-time inference.
How would you optimize inference latency while maintaining prediction quality?
How would you determine when a deployed model should be retrained?
How would you evaluate the success of a newly deployed machine learning model?
Design an MLOps pipeline for training, validating, deploying, monitoring, and continuously improving machine learning models.
How would you deploy a Large Language Model that serves millions of users while balancing latency, throughput, and operational cost?
Explain the trade-offs between deploying AI models on cloud servers, edge devices, and on-premises infrastructure.
How would you design an automated retraining pipeline that minimizes the risk of deploying worse-performing models?
Describe strategies for monitoring and detecting data drift, concept drift, and model drift in production.
How would you optimize GPU utilization for large-scale AI inference?
How would you build a highly available AI inference platform with minimal downtime?
How would you compare A/B testing, canary deployments, and shadow deployments for releasing new AI models?
How would you secure an AI deployment pipeline from model training to production inference?
Describe the architecture of a production AI platform capable of training, deploying, monitoring, and serving hundreds of machine learning models simultaneously.
A newly deployed model achieves excellent offline evaluation scores but performs poorly in production. Walk me through your investigation.
Prediction latency suddenly doubles after a new model deployment. Explain how you would identify the bottleneck.
Your monitoring dashboard reports a gradual decline in prediction accuracy over several months. Describe how you would determine whether retraining is necessary.
A stakeholder wants to replace the production model immediately because a newer model performs better in testing. How would you evaluate whether an immediate rollout is appropriate?
Your AI service suddenly receives ten times more traffic than expected. Explain how you would scale the deployment while maintaining acceptable latency.
A production AI API begins returning inconsistent predictions after an infrastructure update. Walk me through your debugging process.
A healthcare AI model must be updated to improve accuracy, but regulators require that every deployed version remain reproducible. Explain how you would design the deployment process.
An engineer proposes automatically retraining and deploying a new model every night without human review. How would you evaluate this proposal?
Your cloud costs for serving Large Language Models increase dramatically as user adoption grows. Describe the architectural and operational optimizations you would consider.

You're responsible for deploying an enterprise AI platform that serves hundreds of models across multiple regions. Explain how you would design model serving, monitoring, versioning, rollback, scaling, and disaster recovery.
